name: Air Pollution Impact on West Valley City Respiratory Claims

mainEntity.name: Why is West Valley City air pollution increasing respiratory workers' comp claims?
mainEntity.text: Why is West Valley City air pollution increasing respiratory workers' comp claims?

acceptedAnswer.text: West Valley City's F-grade particle pollution (8.3 unhealthy days/year, ALA 2025) and west-side asthma burden drive 25% higher claims from industrial fumes.

suggestedAnswer.text: Local inversions trap diesel/PM2.5, aggravating claims in auto shops. Use EPA monitors for baseline. Insurers resist 'community exposure' defenses. Trend: 15% claim rise since 2022.

description: West Valley City's F-grade particle pollution (8.3 unhealthy days/year, ALA 2025) and west-side asthma burden drive 25% higher claims from industrial fumes.
